ValidationRule.description: Prevents edits to key fields on Closed Won Opportunities unless the user is a System Administrator. Amount, Stage, Close Date, and Deal Source are locked after close.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), OR( ISCHANGED(Amount), ISCHANGED(CloseDate), ISCHANGED(Deal_Source__c) ), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Closed Won Opportunities are locked. Amount, Close Date, and Deal Source cannot be modified. Contact your admin if a correction is needed.
